description: Real-time monitoring of all MPPT solar controllers - voltage, current, power, SOC, faults and LED output

panels.description: Live snapshot of all devices - last 30 min

targets.query:
from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
      r._field == "voltage_v" or r._field == "soc_pct" or
      r._field == "charge_power_w" or r._field == "pv_voltage_v" or
      r._field == "load_power_w" or r._field == "external_temp_c")
  |> group(columns: ["serial", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["serial"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> rename(columns: {serial: "Serial", voltage_v: "V Bat", soc_pct: "SOC %", pv_voltage_v: "V PV", charge_power_w: "Chg W", load_power_w: "Load W", external_temp_c: "Temp °C"})
  |> keep(columns: ["Serial", "V Bat", "SOC %", "V PV", "Chg W", "Load W", "Temp °C"])

from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "charge_mode")
  |> group(columns: ["serial", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({Serial: r.serial, Mode: r._value}))
  |> keep(columns: ["Serial", "Mode"])

panels.title: 📋 Device Status

panels.description: Devices with at least one active fault right now

targets.query:
_s = "${serial}"
from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "faults")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "any_fault")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == 1)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial == _s)
  |> last()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field:
      if r._field == "battery_over_voltage"   then "Battery Over Voltage"
      else if r._field == "pv_over_voltage"         then "PV Over Voltage"
      else if r._field == "charge_over_current"     then "Charge Over Current"
      else if r._field == "lvd_active"              then "Battery Low (LVD)"
      else if r._field == "over_discharge_current"  then "Battery Over-Discharge"
      else if r._field == "load_over_current"       then "Load Over Current"
      else if r._field == "battery_over_temp"       then "Battery Over Temperature"
      else if r._field == "battery_under_temp"      then "Battery Under Temperature"
      else r._field
  }))
  |> group()
  |> rename(columns: {serial: "Serial", _field: "Alert"})
  |> keep(columns: ["Serial", "Alert"])

panels.description: Battery terminal voltage. LiFePO4 nominal: 12.8V, float 13.8V, LVD 11.0V

targets.query:
_s = "${serial}"
from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage_v")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial == _s)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Battery V"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: 🔋 Battery Voltage

panels.description: State of charge - 0-100%. Values below 20% indicate risk of LVD.

targets.query:
_s = "${serial}"
from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "soc_pct")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial == _s)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "SOC %"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: 🔋 Battery SOC

panels.description: PV panel voltage (orange) and the MPPT tracking target (dashed). Convergence = good MPPT.

targets.query:
_s = "${serial}"
from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pv_voltage_v" or r._field == "pv_target_voltage_v")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial == _s)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: if r._field == "pv_voltage_v" then "PV Voltage" else "MPPT Target"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: ☀️ PV Voltage & MPPT Target

panels.description: Charge current (green, in) vs load current (red, out).

targets.query:
_s = "${serial}"
from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "charge_current_a" or r._field == "load_current_a")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial == _s)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: if r._field == "charge_current_a" then "Charge A" else "Load A"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: ⚡ Charge & Load Current

panels.description: External ambient (orange) and internal controller temperature (purple dashed).

targets.query:
_s = "${serial}"
from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "internal_temp_c" or r._field == "external_temp_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial == _s)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: if r._field == "internal_temp_c" then "Internal °C" else "External °C"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: 🌡️ Temperature

panels.description: Solar charge power (green) vs load consumption (red). Gap = net energy into battery.

targets.query:
_s = "${serial}"
from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "charge_power_w" or r._field == "load_power_w")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial == _s)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: if r._field == "charge_power_w" then "Charge W" else "Load W"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: ⚡ Power Balance - Charge vs Load

panels.description: LED driver voltage and current output.

targets.query:
_s = "${serial}"
from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "led_voltage_v" or r._field == "led_current_a")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial == _s)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: if r._field == "led_voltage_v" then "LED V" else "LED A"}))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: 💡 LED Output

panels.description: Boolean fault signals over time. Orange/red = active fault.

options.noValue: ✅ No fault events in selected time range

targets.query:
_s = "${serial}"
from(bucket: "solar")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "faults")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field != "any_fault")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => _s == "$__all" or _s == "" or r.serial == _s)
  |> difference(nonNegative: true)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value > 0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field:
      if r._field == "battery_over_voltage"   then "Battery Over Voltage"
      else if r._field == "pv_over_voltage"         then "PV Over Voltage"
      else if r._field == "charge_over_current"     then "Charge Over Current"
      else if r._field == "lvd_active"              then "Battery Low (LVD)"
      else if r._field == "over_discharge_current"  then "Battery Over-Discharge"
      else if r._field == "load_over_current"       then "Load Over Current"
      else if r._field == "battery_over_temp"       then "Battery Over Temperature"
      else if r._field == "battery_under_temp"      then "Battery Under Temperature"
      else r._field
  }))
  |> group()
  |> rename(columns: {serial: "Serial", _field: "Fault", _time: "Time"})
  |> keep(columns: ["Time", "Serial", "Fault"])
  |> sort(columns: ["Time"], desc: true)

panels.title: ⚠️ Fault Event Log

title: ☀️ MPPT Solar - Live Telemetry
